ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Continued To Jun-27-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Martin Eisenberg for petitioner.

Mr. Eisenberg reported that the real property was the only asset of the estate, and that there are no cash assets. He added that he expected to have the accounting petitio on file shortly. The status hearing was continued to June 27, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not reported)
